title: erioneuron nealleyi
side_effects: Erioneuron nealleyi can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and increased heart rate. In severe cases, ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Additionally, prolonged exposure to its essential oils may cause respiratory problems, including coughing and difficulty breathing. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using Erioneuron nealleyi for any health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
